channel.title: Localization on BodyMetrics Docs
channel.description: Official documentation for BodyMetrics — a Garmin Connect IQ widget for body metrics tracking on your Forerunner 265.

item.title: i18n System
item.description: How BodyMetrics manages multilingual translations — catalog, adapter, fallback, and validator.

item.title: Localization
item.description: Language support and how to change the interface language on your device.
